title: Project Support
lede: Design-build, retrofit, and equipment-upgrade projects delivered by tradespeople who know the install — and the service that comes after. From a single rooftop unit replacement to a campus-wide chiller plant.
metaDescription: Mechanical project work from STR Mechanical — design-build, retrofit, equipment upgrades across NC, VA, and SC.
featuresLead: We don't chase mega-projects we can't staff or one-day jobs that lose money. Our sweet spot is the work that's too complex for a handyman and too operational for a generalist GC.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M9 21V9"/></svg>
features.title: Rooftop unit change-outs
features.body: Crane day to commissioning — including curb adaptation, refrigerant piping, electrical, controls integration, and start-up. We coordinate the crane, the roof inspector, and the AHJ.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M12 7v5l3 3"/></svg>
features.title: Chiller plant retrofits
features.body: End-of-life chiller replacement, capacity upgrades, condenser water system redesigns, VFD additions, primary-secondary conversions.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22V12"/><polyline points="5 9 12 2 19 9"/><path d="M5 9v11h14V9"/></svg>
features.title: Boiler & hot water upgrades
features.body: Atmospheric-to-condensing conversions, boiler plant redundancy upgrades, low-NOx swaps for permit compliance.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M12 1v6M12 17v6M4.22 4.22l4.24 4.24M15.54 15.54l4.24 4.24M1 12h6M17 12h6"/></svg>
features.title: Controls upgrades
features.body: Pneumatic-to-DDC conversions, Niagara migrations, head-end replacements — coordinated with the mechanical work so the system actually runs when we're done.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 12c0-4 4-7 9-7s9 3 9 7-4 7-9 7c-2 0-4-.5-5.5-1.5L3 19l1.5-3.5C3.5 14.5 3 13.3 3 12z"/></svg>
features.title: Tenant fit-outs
features.body: HVAC, controls, plumbing for tenant build-outs — sized to your space plan, sequenced around your construction schedule, commissioned to your standards.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><path d="M7 14l4-4 4 4 5-5"/></svg>
features.title: Energy retrofits
features.body: ESCO-eligible upgrades — variable speed drives, economizer additions, heat recovery, controls optimization. Measurement & verification built in.

whyHeading: The crew that designs it, installs it, and keeps it running.
whyParagraphs: Most mechanical projects suffer the same handoff problem: design firm hands drawings to install crew, install crew hands a system to a service company, service company spends two years untangling assumptions nobody documented. We close that loop.

Our design-assist team sits with our install foremen and our service techs. The job that hits the field has been pressure-tested by the people who'll service it. The system you operate matches the drawings — because we made both.
whyBullets: Single point of accountability — design through warranty
Coordinated with our own service team — no handoff gap
Permits, inspections, and AHJ coordination handled
M&V baked in — you can prove the savings
ctaParagraph: Send us your scope (or just the symptoms — "the chiller is at end-of-life and we're not sure what to do next" is a great starting point). We'll walk the site, develop options, and come back with a proposal.
